chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Hajj of Children

text: 2899 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مَهْزِيَارَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ اَلثَّانِيَ عَنِ اَلصَّبِيِّ مَتَى يُحْرَمُ بِهِ قَالَ «إِذَا اِثَّغَرَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2899 - It was narrated from Ali ibn Mahziyar, from Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl, who said:
I asked Abu Ja'far al-Thani, Imam Muhammad al-Jawad (as) about when a child should be entered into the state of Ihram.
Imam (as) said: "When they begin to grow teeth."
